rows.label: qev013104_MSG0001
rows.name:
I give up! Have mercy! To think
I'd be pushed back like this...
Have my skills dulled...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013104_JNK0010
rows.name: Insist

rows.label: qev013104_SEL0011
rows.name:
Tell him you won't take his life
if he hands over the White Gold.

rows.label: qev013104_JNK0020
rows.name: Interrogate

rows.label: qev013104_SEL0021
rows.name:
Strictly question if he
is hiding anything.

rows.label: qev013104_JNK0030
rows.name: Execute

rows.label: qev013104_SEL0031
rows.name: Kill Briggs without answering.

rows.label: qev013104_MSG0002
rows.name: So you were after the White Gold too...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013104_MSG0003
rows.name:
...Here. This is the key
to the safe. Take it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013104_MSG0004
rows.name:
...Even so. To think I'd be betrayed
by Fosdyke and Moahouse...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013104_MSG0005
rows.name:
Tch... What the hell was that bond we
swore to each other as team members?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013104_MSG0006
rows.name:
That's right. I can't die
before telling the truth![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013104_MSG0007
rows.name:
...Hey, you. Why did you trust
Fosdyke and Moahouse? Do you think
I'm monopolizing the White Gold?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013104_MSG0008
rows.name:
Don't you think it's strange? Fosdyke and
Moahouse quit BLADE and supposedly live in
poverty, yet they live a life of leisure.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013104_MSG0009
rows.name:
As you can see, I live alone
here, keeping watch over the
White Gold. Every day is boring.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013104_MSG0010
rows.name:
...The truth is, those two
are working me to the bone.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013104_MSG0011
rows.name: Please, free me from those two![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013104_JNK0040
rows.name: Trust

rows.label: qev013104_SEL0041
rows.name: Believe Briggs.

rows.label: qev013104_JNK0050
rows.name: Distrust

rows.label: qev013104_SEL0051
rows.name: Don't believe Briggs.

rows.label: qev013104_MSG0013
rows.name:
Oh, you believe me? A
comeback victory...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013104_MSG0014
rows.name:
Here, this is the key to the safe.
Please take the White Gold away.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013104_MSG0015
rows.name: Oh, I can't believe you trust them...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013104_MSG0016
rows.name:
Then... Open the safe and look at
the White Gold inside. If you do,
the truth should become clear.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013104_MSG0017
rows.name: Here, this is the key to the safe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013104_MSG0018
rows.name: Dammit! Suddenly!? Uwaaaaah![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013104_MSG0019
rows.name: ...Ugh.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013104_MSG0020
rows.name:
...Do you want the White Gold that badly?
Then I'll give you the key. And you can
see the truth... for yourself...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013104_MSG0021
rows.name:
I've been manipulated by greedy bastards
until the very end... of my life...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013104_MSG0022
rows.name:
Hurry up and try opening the safe.
It should open with that key.[ST:wait ]
